about.title: About
about.description: I am Marta Pinedo, a lawyer specialising in civil and commercial law. My experience in family law firms, large companies and courts has enabled me to develop skills in dispute resolution, case management and contract review.

asesoria.name: Legal Advice & Consultancy
asesoria.description: Civil, commercial and administrative law support to help you make informed legal decisions with confidence.

redaccion.name: Contract Review & Drafting
redaccion.description: I ensure clear, secure contracts that protect your interests and help prevent disputes.

representacion.name: Legal Representation in Litigation
representacion.description: I defend your case with dedication and a personal approach, from preparation through hearings.

gestion.name: Administration Proceedings Management
gestion.description: I manage summons, fines and other procedures so you can meet legal obligations without hassle.

resolucion.name: Alternative Dispute Resolution
resolucion.description: I pursue peaceful solutions via mediation and negotiation to avoid litigation and preserve relationships.

legal.title: Legal conditions

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: In accordance with the current data protection regulations, we inform you that the data you provide will be incorporated into an automated file for which MARTA PINEDO SÁNCHEZ is responsible, with tax ID: 01190225K. The purpose of this file is the management of personal data for the exercise of the legal profession and the defense in judicial and extrajudicial procedures, with the legitimacy of executing a contract or service and/or the consent of the interested party. Likewise, you are informed that the data will not be transferred to third parties except in cases of legal obligation and that you can exercise your rights to access, rectify and delete the data, as well as other rights, as explained in the additional information. The data comes from the legal representative, public records, and public administrations. You can consult the additional detailed information about data protection by sending an email to: martapinedo@icam.es
